---
title: "Sports & Odds"
subtitle: "Betting algorithms, player props, and sports analytics"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, description]
  exclude:
    index.qmd: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## What You'll Find Here

NBA player prop models, college football betting trends, and sports analytics experiments. Every post includes:

- **The Data**: Real APIs (ESPN, CFBD, odds providers)
- **The Code**: Jupyter notebooks with Python, Pandas, Plotly
- **The Results**: Interactive charts and model outputs

If you're building your own sports models or just curious what the data says, start here.

---

## All Sports Posts

<!-- Listing automatically generates below -->
